name: Two-Bean and Cheddar Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Grease a pie plate that measures 10 x 5 inches.
3. In a medium bowl, mix together the flour, 1/2 cup shredded cheddar cheese, baking powder, and salt.
4. Stir in milk and beaten egg until well blended.
5. Spread this mixture evenly over the bottom and sides of the prepared pie plate.
6. In another bowl, combine the remaining 1/2 cup shredded cheddar cheese with the drained garbanzos, kidney beans, tomato sauce, chopped green bell pepper, chopped onion, chili powder, dried oregano leaves, and garlic powder.
7. Spoon this mixture into the pie plate over the base layer.
8. Sprinkle the remaining shredded cheddar cheese on top.
9. Bake for about 25 minutes or until the edges are puffy and lightly browned.
10. Allow the pie to stand for 10 minutes before cutting and serving.
